summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Escalation Matrix feature. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including CRUD operations, Run Check, and mobile responsiveness.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on form inputs - makes automated testing harder

passed_tests: Navigate to Escalation page from sidebar - PASSED
Stats cards show 0 counts initially - PASSED
Create new escalation policy with name, trigger, levels, and actions - PASSED
Policy appears in the policies list after creation - PASSED
Edit an existing policy - PASSED (dialog opens with pre-filled data)
Delete a policy - PASSED (soft delete with toast confirmation)
Run Check button triggers escalation check - PASSED (toast: 'Escalation check completed')
Escalated Orders tab shows empty state when no escalated orders - PASSED
Mobile responsiveness of escalation page - PASSED
action_items: Consider adding data-testid attributes to form inputs in EscalationPolicies.js for better test automation
critical_code_review_comments: EscalationPolicies.js: Form inputs lack data-testid attributes - recommend adding for testability
escalation.py routes: Well-structured with proper error handling and validation
escalation_engine.py: Comprehensive action execution with proper error handling
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed policies during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Escalation Matrix feature is fully functional. Backend APIs support full CRUD for policies, escalated orders listing, escalation history, and manual escalation check trigger. Frontend page includes stats cards, policy list with edit/delete, create policy dialog with multi-level configuration, and escalated orders tab. Mobile responsiveness is good. The escalation engine integrates with SLA monitor for automatic escalation processing.

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: MOCKED - OTP delivery is logged to console instead of sent via real service
mocked_apis.Email_sending: Email sending is attempted but may fail if SMTP is not configured

features_verified.escalation_page_navigation: WORKING - accessible from sidebar with AlertTriangle icon
features_verified.stats_cards: WORKING - shows Escalated Orders, Unacknowledged, Today, Active Policies counts
features_verified.policy_crud: WORKING - create, read, update, delete all functional
features_verified.run_check_button: WORKING - triggers escalation check with toast confirmation
features_verified.escalated_orders_tab: WORKING - shows empty state or escalated orders list
features_verified.mobile_responsiveness: WORKING - layout adapts to mobile viewport

escalation_action_types_supported: notify_user - Send in-app notification to specific user
notify_role - Notify all users with a specific role
reassign_user - Reassign ticket to specific user
reassign_team - Reassign to next available team member
